O0250A Influenza Received Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received the influenza vaccination in this facility. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
505 O0250B_INFLNZ_RCVD_DT O0250B_INFLNZ_RCVD_DT O0250B Influenza Received Date CHAR 8 The data in this column indicates the date that the influenza vaccination was received.
506 O0250C_RSN_INFLNZ_NOT_RCV_CD O0250C_RSN_INFLNZ_NOT_RCV_CD O0250C Reason Influenza Not Received Code CHAR 1 The data in this column
